title: SQL column renamed during normalization, TS field never updated
narrative: A DB normalization PR renamed 'currentPeriodEnd' to 'current_period_end' across 14 tables to standardize on snake_case. The TS interfaces were never updated. The ORM mapping config was patched to bridge the gap. Six months later, a developer writes a raw SQL migration that joins on the canonical TS field name and discovers production has been silently using the mapped name all along — except for one table that the mapping config missed.
